One of The Best Education instituteElite Computer Institute of the town

Elite Computer Institute is a premier institution dedicated to providing top-notch computer education. With state-of-the-art facilities and experienced faculty, we offer comprehensive courses tailored to meet the demands of today's technology-driven world. Our mission is to empower students with the knowledge and skills needed to excel in the field of computer science and IT. Join us at Elite Computer Institute and embark on a journey towards a successful career in the digital age.

About Elite Institute Courses

Our Courses

Our mission is to empower students with the knowledge and skills needed to excel in the field of computer science and IT.

Basic Web Designing Course

Rs. 7500

Basic Web Design Course

Our Basic Web Design Course offers essential skills for creating visually appealing and functional websites. Covering HTML, CSS, and introductory concepts, students learn to design and build web pages from scratch. Gain practical experience and start your journey into the exciting world of web design with us today.

Basic Web Designing Course

Rs. 7500

Basic Computer Education Course

Our Basic Computer Education Course provides fundamental knowledge and skills for beginners. Covering essential topics such as computer basics, operating systems, internet usage, and Microsoft Office applications, this course equips students with the foundational understanding needed to navigate the digital world confidently. Start your computer literacy journey with us now.

  • 4.5
1k Enrolled 2 Month From 9:00 AM (Any Two hrs.)

Basic Web Programming Course

Rs. 7500

Basic Web Programming Course

Our Basic Web Programming Course introduces key concepts in web development, focusing on HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Students learn to create interactive and dynamic web pages from scratch, gaining essential skills for entry-level positions in the tech industry. Dive into the world of web programming with us and unleash your coding potential.

  • 4.5
1.5k Enrolled 2 Month 16:00 - 18:00

Trending Course

Explore our Trending IT Course covering cutting-edge topics like artificial intelligence, machine learning, cloud computing, and cybersecurity. Stay ahead in the dynamic field of technology and unlock exciting career opportunities.

Books & Library

At our computer institute, we boast a diverse collection of books and resources in our library, covering a wide range of topics in computer science, programming languages, software development, and more. Students have access to these resources to enhance their learning experience and deepen their understanding of technology.

Best Facility

One of the premier facilities offered by our computer institute is our cutting-edge computer lab equipped with the latest hardware and software. Additionally, we provide high-speed internet access, comfortable learning spaces, and access to industry-standard software tools. Our experienced faculty members offer personalized guidance and mentorship to ensure the best learning experience for our students.

Certified Teachers

Our institute employs certified teachers who hold minimum MSc (IT), MCA, or MSc (CS) degrees. With their expertise and advanced qualifications, they provide high-quality education and mentorship to our students, ensuring a comprehensive learning experience aligned with industry standards and best practices.

We Focus on Development of Skill & Knowledge

Students join our computer courses to gain essential skills and knowledge for lucrative careers in the tech industry. Our comprehensive curriculum, experienced faculty, and hands-on learning approach provide students with the confidence and expertise needed to succeed in today's digital world, opening doors to diverse employment opportunities.

Join With Now View Courses

Frequently Asked Questions

Here you have the list of common inquiries and their corresponding answers, designed to provide quick and helpful information to users about a particular topic, product, or service.

How do i get addmission for any course?

To get admission for any course at our computer institute, simply visit our website or contact our admissions office. You can fill out an online application form or visit our campus in person to complete the admission process. Our friendly staff will guide you through the required steps and assist with any inquiries you may have.

How do i need to Pay Fees Lump Sum/Instalment?

You have the option to pay the fees either as a lump sum or in installments at our computer institute. Our admissions team will provide you with detailed information about the payment options available, including deadlines and any applicable policies. Choose the payment method that best suits your financial situation and preferences.

Does i may suspend from the Institute for doing wrong?

Yes, you may be suspended from the institute for engaging in wrongful behavior. Our institute upholds standards of conduct and ethics, and any actions deemed inappropriate or in violation of our policies may result in disciplinary measures, including suspension. We expect all students to adhere to our rules and regulations to maintain a positive learning environment for everyone.

Does any guarantee provided by the Institute to get full knowledge of the subject getting admission ?

While we strive to provide comprehensive education and support to our students, we cannot guarantee that every individual will attain full knowledge of the subject upon admission. However, our institute is committed to delivering 100% high-quality instruction, resources, and guidance to facilitate learning. Success ultimately depends on the effort, dedication, and engagement of each student.
